topic.concept: Reviewing all the colors with a gentle rainbow parade of balloons
props: a rainbow arching over a hill

title: Pip & Lulu's Rainbow Balloon Parade! Learn All the Colors!
description: Join Pip the panda and Lulu the bunny for a wonderful rainbow balloon parade! Let's learn and sing about all the beautiful colors of the rainbow together. It's a happy, colorful adventure!

lyrics_sections.name: Rainbow Balloons Intro
lines: Oh, look! What do you see?
Balloons, balloons, for you and me!
lyrics_sections.visual_theme: Pip and Lulu skip hand-in-paw under the big rainbow arch, each holding a red balloon and looking up at more yellow balloons floating gently around them.

lyrics_sections.name: More Rainbow Colors
lines: So many colors, what a sight!
lyrics_sections.visual_theme: Pip and Lulu giggle as they wave colorful flags on the hill, while a parade of green, purple, and orange balloons floats past them towards the rainbow.

scenes.name: Rainbow Balloons Intro
lines: Oh, look! What do you see?
Balloons, balloons, for you and me!
clip_prompts: Wide establishing shot. [00:00-00:04] Pip waves hello and smiles at the camera. [00:04-00:08] The friends look at pip and Lulu skip hand-in-paw under the big rainbow arch, each holding a red balloon and looking up at more yellow balloons floating gently around them. Make the learning subject unmistakably clear: all the rainbow colors. Characters (keep their exact appearance consistent): Pip: a round fluffy baby panda cub with big friendly eyes, soft black-and-white fur, and a little red scarf. Lulu: a soft cream-colored baby bunny with long floppy ears, rosy cheeks, and a small yellow bow. Soft 3D cartoon animation in the style of modern preschool shows: rounded plush-like characters with big warm friendly eyes, bright pastel colors, soft even daylight, gentle slow camera moves, polished high-quality render, cozy storybook world. Soft, bright, G-rated preschool animation. Gentle slow movements, warm daylight, smiling friendly characters, calm and joyful mood throughout. Everything is safe, soft-edged, and comforting for a 2-year-old viewer. Avoid: darkness, night, shadows, scary faces, sharp teeth, claws, weapons, fire, smoke, falling, crying, injury, chase, strangers, flashing lights, strobe, fast cuts, distorted faces, text, watermark.

Medium shot on the action. [00:00-00:04] Pip and Lulu skip hand-in-paw under the big rainbow arch, each holding a red balloon and looking up at more yellow balloons floating gently around them. [00:04-00:08] The characters clap and bounce gently in rhythm, delighted. Make the learning subject unmistakably clear: all the rainbow colors. Soft, bright, G-rated preschool animation. Gentle slow movements, warm daylight, smiling friendly characters, calm and joyful mood throughout. Everything is safe, soft-edged, and comforting for a 2-year-old viewer. Avoid: darkness, night, shadows, scary faces, sharp teeth, claws, weapons, fire, smoke, falling, crying, injury, chase, strangers, flashing lights, strobe, fast cuts, distorted faces, text, watermark.

Playful closing shot. [00:00-00:04] The friends dance a simple gentle dance together. [00:04-00:08] They cheer softly and strike a happy pose, ready to sing again.
